pageContext.name: Nyota Uhura 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: Our Chibi® Coin series for Star Trek expands to five coins with the introduction of the capable communications officer for the U.S.S. Enterprise, Lieutenant Uhura.   This coin is made from 1oz pure silver that has been coloured and shaped to show Uhura in her red Starfleet uniform, with her black boots and bouffant hair. The custom-made outer box complements the coin inside, which can be viewed through the large window. This allows you to display your precious collectible, untouched. However, once inside the coin is further protected by an acrylic case, so you can take a close-up view.   With only 2,000 being minted, this is a perfect piece of Trek fan treasure.  Open hailing frequencies and order today!
